info.title: PowerDNS Admin API - Administrator Documentation
info.description:
**Administrator API** - Full system access for PowerDNS management and configuration.

For user-focused documentation, see `/openapi-user.yaml`

## Authentication

**Admin API Key Required** - Single API key provides full administrative access.
Include `X-API-Key` or `Authorization: Bearer` header in requests.

**Dual Authentication:**
1. **Valid Admin API Key** - From AVANT_API_KEY environment variable
2. **Global IP Allowlist** - Client IP must be in allowlist

## Account-Scoped API Keys (New)

Create and manage account-scoped API keys for customers/users:
- Restrict access to specific account's domains
- Granular permissions (read, write, create, delete)
- Optional per-key IP restrictions
- Expiration dates and usage tracking
- See `/api/api-keys` endpoints below

## Environment Configuration
All sensitive configuration (API keys, database credentials, hosts) is stored in `.env`:
- `AVANT_API_KEY` - Admin API key for authentication
- `PDNS_API_KEY` - PowerDNS Admin API key
- `PDNS_SERVER_KEY` - PowerDNS Server API key
- `API_DB_HOST`, `API_DB_NAME`, `API_DB_USER`, `API_DB_PASS` - Local business logic database
- `PDNS_ADMIN_DB_HOST`, `PDNS_ADMIN_DB_NAME`, `PDNS_ADMIN_DB_USER`, `PDNS_ADMIN_DB_PASS` - PowerDNS Admin database
- IP allowlist and other security settings

## Core Features
- Account and user management with PowerDNS Admin sync
- Domain management with intelligent ID/name detection
- DNS record management via PowerDNS Server API
- Template-based domain creation
- Local database caching and metadata storage
- Secure environment-based configuration (no hardcoded credentials)

contact.name: API Support - Silvester van der Leer

get.description: Returns API documentation and available endpoints

Retrieve accounts from local database with PowerDNS Admin synchronization.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**Filter Logic (AND conditions):**
- Single parameter: Direct lookup
- Multiple parameters: Must ALL match (validation)
- `?id=14&username=admin` returns user only if ID 14 has username "admin"
- Returns 404 if parameters don't match the same user

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Filter by account ID (can combine with other filters for validation)

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Filter by username (can combine with ID for validation)

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter by email address (can combine with other filters)

parameters.name: sync
parameters.description: Sync from PowerDNS Admin before filtering

200.description: List of accounts or single account (with AND validation)

value.message: Found user with ID 14 and username 'admin'

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

404.description: No accounts found or AND validation failed

post.description:
Create a new account with optional IP addresses. The account is created in both PDNSAdmin and local database.

**� Requires Admin API Key**

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

409.description: Conflict - Username or email already exists

put.description:
Update an existing account using JSON input. Changes are synced with PDNSAdmin (except IP addresses).

**� Requires Admin API Key**

**JSON Payload (Required):**
- Include account identifier (`id` or `username`)
- Include fields to update
- IP addresses are stored locally only

delete.description:
Delete an account from PowerDNS Admin using JSON input. The local database is automatically synced after deletion.

**� Requires Admin API Key**
**⚠️ Warning:** This action cannot be undone.

**JSON Payload (Required):**
- Use `{"id": 94}` to delete account by ID
- Use `{"username": "johndoe"}` to delete account by username

**Important:** This operation only deletes from PowerDNS Admin. The local database is updated through 
automatic synchronization, ensuring the API remains the authoritative source for account management.

get.description:
Retrieve domains/zones with automatic PowerDNS Admin synchronization.

**Smart Query with AND Filters:**
- `q` parameter: Auto-detects search type (ID/name/pattern/contains)  
- Additional filters: Combined as AND conditions
- `?q=example.com&account_id=5` finds "example.com" AND belongs to account 5

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Additional filter - must match account (AND condition with q)

parameters.name: sync
parameters.description: Sync from PowerDNS Admin before filtering

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Include full DNS records via PowerDNS Server API (requires PowerDNS API key)

query_type.description: The type of query that was executed

post.description:
Add a domain to a specific account. This operation uses direct API calls
to assign domains to accounts in PowerDNS Admin.

**JSON Payload:**
- `domain_name`: Domain name to assign (required)
- `account_id`: Target account ID (required)

domain_name.description: Domain name to add (include trailing dot)

account_id.description: Account ID to assign domain to

put.summary: Update domain by ID or name
put.description:
Update domain settings and DNS records.
Supports both ID and name-based updates with PowerDNS Admin and Server API integration.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**⚠️ SECURITY WARNINGS:**
- **Domain Ownership:** Only domains owned by authenticated account can be modified
- **DNS Record Validation:** All DNS records are validated before application
- **Account Transfer:** Changing account_id requires ownership verification
- **Zone Type Changes:** Changing kind/masters affects DNS resolution - use with caution

**🛡️ VALIDATION ENFORCED:**
- DNS record content validated (A/AAAA/CNAME/MX formats)
- Master server IPs validated for Slave zones
- Account ownership verified before transfers
- DNSSEC changes require additional validation

id.description: Domain ID (use this OR name, not both)

name.description: Domain name (use this OR id, not both)

account_id.description: Account ID to assign domain to

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid DNS records or validation failed

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

422.description: Validation Error - DNS record validation failed

delete.summary: Delete domain by ID or name
delete.description:
**🚨 DESTRUCTIVE OPERATION** - Delete domain permanently.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**⚠️ CRITICAL SECURITY WARNINGS:**
- **Irreversible Action:** Domain deletion cannot be undone
- **Ownership Verification:** Only domains owned by authenticated account can be deleted  
- **DNS Resolution Impact:** Domain will immediately stop resolving
- **Cascade Effects:** All DNS records will be permanently lost
- **Zone Dependencies:** Check for dependent subdomains before deletion

**🛡️ SAFETY MEASURES:**
- Domain ownership verified before deletion
- Audit logging with administrator details
- PowerDNS Admin and local database automatically synced

id.description: Domain ID (use this OR name, not both)

name.description: Domain name (use this OR id, not both)

records_count.description: Number of DNS records that were deleted

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

get.description: Retrieve a specific domain by its ID from the local database.

put.description:
Update a specific domain using path parameter for ID.
Alternative to PUT /domains with JSON payload.

**🔐 SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:**
- Admin API key required for ALL modifications
- Ownership validation enforced (can only modify domains you own)
- Input validation prevents DNS record injection attacks
- All changes logged for audit trails

change_account.description: Move a domain to a different account (requires admin privileges)

enable_dnssec.description: Activate DNSSEC signing for the zone

convert_to_slave.description: Change zone type to slave and configure master servers

update_slave_masters.summary: Update master servers for slave zone
update_slave_masters.description: Change which servers to replicate from

400.description:
Bad request - invalid input data
- Invalid domain configuration
- Malformed JSON payload
- Invalid DNS record format

403.description:
Forbidden - security violation
- Domain not owned by authenticated user
- Insufficient permissions for operation
- API key lacks required privileges

422.description:
Validation failed
- DNS record validation errors
- Domain name format violations
- Invalid record type combinations

delete.description:
Delete a domain from both local database and PowerDNS Admin.

**⚠️ DANGER: IRREVERSIBLE OPERATION**
- Permanently deletes domain and ALL DNS records
- Cannot be undone - ensure you have backups
- Requires admin API key with full privileges

**🔐 SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:**
- Admin API key required for ALL deletions
- Ownership validation enforced (can only delete domains you own)
- Domain must be in "inactive" state before deletion
- All operations logged for audit trails

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force deletion even if domain has active records (dangerous)

403.description:
Forbidden - security violation
- Domain not owned by authenticated user
- Domain has active DNS records (use force=true to override)
- API key lacks deletion privileges

409.description:
Conflict - cannot delete
- Domain has active DNS records
- Domain is referenced by other resources
- Concurrent modification detected

get.description:
Retrieve all available domain templates from PowerDNS Admin.
Templates can be used to create domains with predefined settings.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

post.description:
Create a new domain template in PowerDNS Admin.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**🔐 SECURITY CONSIDERATIONS:**
- Template content validated for DNS record injection
- Template names must be unique and follow naming conventions
- All template creation logged for audit trails
- Input sanitization prevents malicious template content

400.description:
Bad request - invalid template data
- Invalid DNS record format in template
- Malformed JSON payload
- Template name validation failed

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

409.description:
Conflict - template already exists
- Template name already in use
- Duplicate template content detected

422.description:
Validation failed
- DNS record validation errors in template
- Invalid template structure
- Template content security violations

get.description: Retrieve a specific domain template by its ID.

delete.description:
Delete a domain template from PowerDNS Admin.
**Warning**: This action cannot be undone.

post.description:
Create a new domain using a predefined template.
The template will be applied to set up the domain with default records and settings.

account_id.description: Account ID to assign the domain to

post.description:
Perform operations to manage domain-account relationships.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**⚠️ CRITICAL SECURITY WARNINGS:**
- **DOMAIN HIJACKING RISK:** Can reassign domains between accounts
- **OWNERSHIP VALIDATION:** Must verify current account owns domain before changes
- **AUDIT TRAIL:** All domain reassignments logged with timestamps and user info
- **IRREVERSIBLE:** Domain reassignments cannot be easily undone

**🔐 SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:**
- Admin API key required for ALL operations
- Domain ownership verified before any modifications
- Account permissions checked before assignments
- Rate limiting enforced to prevent abuse

400.description:
Bad request - invalid operation parameters
- Invalid domain name format
- Missing required fields
- Invalid account ID

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

403.description:
Forbidden - security violation
- Domain not owned by source account
- Insufficient permissions for domain reassignment
- Account lacks required privileges

404.description:
Not found
- Domain does not exist
- Account not found
- Domain-account relationship not found

409.description:
Conflict - operation cannot be completed
- Domain already assigned to target account
- Concurrent modification detected
- Domain in locked state

get.description:
Get API status and health information.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**ℹ️ INFORMATION SECURITY:**
- System status information restricted to admins only
- Health checks reveal internal system state
- Connection tests may expose backend configuration
- All status requests logged for security monitoring

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

get.description:
Retrieve all IP addresses in the global allowlist.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**🛡️ SECURITY MANAGEMENT:**
- View all allowed IP addresses and CIDR ranges
- Check enabled/disabled status
- Review descriptions and timestamps
- Critical for security auditing and management

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

post.description:
Add a new IP address or CIDR range to the global allowlist.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**🛡️ SECURITY IMPACT:**
- Grants API access to specified IP/range
- Takes effect immediately
- All new IPs are enabled by default
- Supports both IPv4 and IPv6 with CIDR notation

enabled.description: Whether this IP should be enabled

400.description: Bad request - Invalid IP address or missing required fields

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

409.description: Conflict - IP address already exists in allowlist

put.description:
Update an existing IP allowlist entry.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**🛡️ SECURITY IMPACT:**
- Modify existing IP access permissions
- Can enable/disable access without deletion
- Changes take effect immediately

ip_address.description: Updated IP address or CIDR range

enabled.description: Enable or disable this IP entry

400.description: Bad request - Invalid data or no fields to update

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

404.description: Not found - IP allowlist entry not found

409.description: Conflict - IP address already exists in allowlist

delete.description:
Remove an IP address from the global allowlist.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**⚠️ SECURITY WARNING:**
- Permanently removes IP access
- Cannot be undone without re-adding
- May immediately block active connections from this IP
- Use disable instead for temporary access removal

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

404.description: Not found - IP allowlist entry not found

post.description:
Test if a specific IP address would be allowed by the current allowlist.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**🔍 TESTING & DEBUGGING:**
- Validate IP access before making changes
- Test CIDR range matching
- Verify allowlist configuration
- Useful for troubleshooting access issues

400.description: Bad request - Invalid IP address format

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

get.description:
Retrieve all account-scoped API keys.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**🔐 API KEY MANAGEMENT:**
- View all account-scoped API keys
- See key previews (first 12 characters)
- Check account associations
- Review permissions and IP restrictions
- Monitor last usage timestamps
- Note: Full API key is NEVER returned (only on creation)

**SECURITY LAYERS:**
1. **Global IP Allowlist** - All requests must pass this first
2. **Per-Key IP Restrictions** - Optional additional IP filtering per key
3. **Account Scope** - Keys restricted to specific account's domains
4. **Permissions** - Granular read/write/create/delete control

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Filter API keys by account ID

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

403.description: Forbidden - Only admin API keys can manage API keys

post.description:
Create a new API key for a specific account with granular permissions.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**⚠️ IMPORTANT: Full API key is ONLY shown once on creation!**

**PERMISSION STRUCTURE:**
```json
{
  "domains": "rw",           // "r" (read), "w" (write), "rw" (both)
  "create_domains": true,    // Can create new domains
  "delete_domains": false,   // Can delete domains
  "scope": "account"         // Always "account" for scoped keys
}
```

**IP RESTRICTIONS:**
- `allowed_ips: null` - Uses global allowlist only
- `allowed_ips: [...]` - Client IP must be in BOTH global AND key-specific lists
- Supports single IPs: `"192.168.1.100"`
- Supports CIDR ranges: `"10.0.0.0/8"`, `"192.168.1.0/24"`

account_id.description: Account ID this key will be restricted to

description.description: Human-readable description of the key's purpose

allowed_ips.description: Array of allowed IP addresses/CIDR ranges (null = no restriction)

api_key.description: ⚠️ SAVE THIS! Full key only shown once

warning.example: Save this API key securely. It will not be displayed again.

400.description: Bad request - Missing required fields or invalid data

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

403.description: Forbidden - Only admin API keys can create API keys

404.description: Not found - Account does not exist

Retrieve details for a specific API key.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**Note:** Full API key is never returned, only preview (first 12 chars)

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

404.description: Not found - API key not found

put.description:
Update an existing API key's permissions, description, or IP restrictions.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**UPDATABLE FIELDS:**
- Description
- Permissions (domains, create_domains, delete_domains)
- IP restrictions (allowed_ips)
- Enabled status
- Expiration date

**Note:** The API key itself cannot be changed

allowed_ips.description: Set to [] or null to remove IP restrictions

400.description: Bad request - Invalid data or no fields to update

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

403.description: Forbidden - Only admin API keys can update API keys

404.description: Not found - API key not found

delete.description:
Permanently delete an API key.

**🔑 Requires Admin API Key**

**⚠️ WARNING:**
- Permanently removes the API key
- Cannot be undone
- Active sessions using this key will be invalidated
- Consider disabling instead for temporary deactivation

401.description: Unauthorized - Valid Admin API Key required

403.description: Forbidden - Only admin API keys can delete API keys

404.description: Not found - API key not found

AdminApiKey.name: X-API-Key
AdminApiKey.description:
**ADMIN API KEY + GLOBAL IP ALLOWLIST AUTHENTICATION**

**DUAL AUTHENTICATION - SIMPLE & SECURE:**
1. **Valid Admin API Key** - Single key for all administrative access  
2. **Global IP Allowlist** - Same allowlist applies to ALL endpoints uniformly

**📋 AUTHENTICATION REQUIREMENTS:**
- **Swagger UI access** - No authentication required (for easy development)
- **OpenAPI documentation** - No authentication required (for easy access)  
- **ALL API endpoints** - Full authentication required (API key + IP allowlist)
- **Health check** - No authentication required (monitoring)

**API Key Format:** `X-API-Key: <your-api-key>`

**Example:** 
```
Authorization: Basic NDZiM2Q3OGM1NTdjZDY2YTA0N2EzODg5NzkxNGQyMDNhYjVjMzU5NzE5MTYxZTgzNmVjY2U1NTA4ZTU3YjFhOTo=
```

**🛡️ GLOBAL IP ALLOWLIST - DATABASE-DRIVEN & DYNAMIC:**
- Single allowlist applies to ALL API endpoints uniformly
- **Stored in MySQL database** for persistence and easy management
- No per-endpoint complexity - either you're allowed or you're not
- Both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses supported with CIDR notation
- **Enable/disable IPs** without deletion for temporary access control
- Easy to manage via CLI tool and audit via database logs

**Dynamic Management via CLI:**
```bash
# List all allowed IPs
php manage-ips-clean.php list

# Add IPs with descriptions
php manage-ips-clean.php add "203.0.113.25" "Admin home IP"
php manage-ips-clean.php add "192.168.1.0/24" "Office network"
php manage-ips-clean.php add "2001:db8::/32" "IPv6 network"

# Temporarily disable/enable IPs
php manage-ips-clean.php disable "203.0.113.25"
php manage-ips-clean.php enable "203.0.113.25"

# Remove IPs permanently
php manage-ips-clean.php remove "203.0.113.25"

# Test IP access
php manage-ips-clean.php test "192.168.1.100"
```

**Database Storage:**
```sql
-- IPs stored in ip_allowlist table
SELECT ip_address, description, enabled 
FROM ip_allowlist 
WHERE enabled = 1;
```

**Security Benefits:**
- **Defense in depth:** Both API key AND IP must be valid
- **Zero complexity:** Same rules apply everywhere  
- **Dynamic management:** Add/remove IPs without restarts
- **Database persistence:** Changes survive server restarts
- **Temporary control:** Enable/disable without deletion
- **Complete protection:** API inaccessible from non-allowed IPs
- **Performance:** In-memory caching with database fallback

**Security Notes:**
- **Dual authentication:** API key AND IP allowlist required
- One API key for all administrative operations  
- Full access to accounts, domains, templates, and DNS records
- **Database-driven allowlist** prevents unauthorized access even with valid key
- Should be rotated regularly and kept secure
- **Update allowlist dynamically** via CLI tool when network changes
- **Audit trail:** All IP changes tracked in database with timestamps

ip_addresses.description: List of IP addresses (IPv4/IPv6, local storage only)

pdns_account_id.description: PowerDNS Admin account ID (synced from PowerDNS Admin)

username.description: Username for PowerDNS Admin (must be unique)

plain_text_password.description: Plain text password for PowerDNS Admin user

ip_addresses.description: List of IP addresses (IPv4/IPv6, local storage only)

AccountIdentifier.description: Account identifier object (either ID or username, not both)

AccountUpdateRequest.description: Account update request with identifier and update fields

enabled.description: Whether this IP is currently enabled

updated_at.description: When this entry was last updated

DomainUpdate.description:
Domain update configuration. All fields are optional - only include fields you want to update.

**Common Use Cases:**
- Transfer domain to another account
- Enable/disable DNSSEC
- Convert between zone types (Native/Master/Slave)
- Update master servers for slave zones

account_id.description:
Account ID to assign domain to.
- Set to account ID to transfer domain
- Set to `null` to remove account assignment
- Requires admin privileges

kind.description:
Zone type/kind:
- **Native**: Standard PowerDNS zone (most common)
- **Master**: Authoritative zone that can be transferred
- **Slave**: Zone replicated from master servers

masters.description:
Master server IP addresses for slave zones.
- Required when `kind: "Slave"`
- Must be valid IPv4/IPv6 addresses
- Can specify multiple masters for redundancy
- Ignored for Native/Master zones

dnssec.description:
Enable or disable DNSSEC signing.
- `true`: Enable DNSSEC (generates keys and signs zone)
- `false`: Disable DNSSEC (removes signatures)
- Requires PowerDNS DNSSEC support enabled

DomainDetails.description: Complete domain information from PowerDNS Server API

RRSetUpdate.description:
DNS record set update operation with security validation.

**🛡️ SECURITY VALIDATION:**
- Record names must belong to the domain being updated
- DNS record content validated for proper format
- Dangerous record types (NS, SOA) require additional verification
- Maximum 100 records per update to prevent abuse

name.description: Record name (FQDN with trailing dot) - must be subdomain of zone

type.description: DNS record type (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SRV)

records.description: Records for REPLACE operations (omit for DELETE)

domain_name.description: Domain name to add to account
Domain name to remove from account

account_id.description: Account ID to list domains for

key_preview.description: First 12 characters of API key (full key never returned)

account_id.description: Account ID this key is restricted to (null = admin key)

description.example: Production API key for customer portal

allowed_ips.description: Allowed IP addresses/CIDR ranges (null = no restriction)

created_by.description: Admin user who created this key
